sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: KLA는 2026 회계연도 3분기 매출 34억 1,500만 달러를 기록하며 가이던스 중간값을 상회하는 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 34억 1,500만 달러를 기록하며 가이던스 범위인 33억 5,000만 달러의 중간값을 상회했습니다.
주주 환원 정책의 일환으로 분기 배당금을 주당 2.30달러로 인상하고 70억 달러 규모의 자사주 매입을 추가 승인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: AI 생태계의 핵심 공급자로서 파운드리/로직, 메모리, 첨단 패키징 및 서비스 등 주요 성장 분야 전반에서 글로벌 AI 인프라 구축의 혜택을 지속하고 있습니다.
최근 업계 보고서를 통해 공정 제어(process control) 시장에서의 시장 점유율 모멘텀이 지속되고 있음을 확인했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2026 회계연도 4분기 매출 가이던스를 35억 7,500만 달러(±2억 달러)로 제시했습니다.

watchItems.text: 글로벌 AI 인프라 투자 확대가 향후 분기별 매출 성장세와 공정 제어 시장 점유율 유지에 미치는 영향력을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991earningsrelease3.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Investor Relations: Media Relations: Kevin Kessel, CFA Mike Dulin Vice President, Investor Relations Corporate Communications (408) 875-6627 michael.dulin@kla.com kevin.kessel@kla.com KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results • Total revenues were $3.415 billion, above the midpoint of the guidance range of $3.35 billion +/- $150 million; • GAAP diluted EPS was $9.12 and non-GAAP diluted EPS was $9.40, both above the midpoints of the respective guidance ranges; • Cash flow from operating activities for the quarter and last twelve months wer  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.415 billion = 34억 1,500만 달러; $3.35 billion = 33억 5,000만 달러; $150 million = 1억 5,000만 달러; $707.5 million = 7억 750만 달러; $4.40 billion = 44억 달러; $622.3 million = 6억 2,230만 달러; $4.01 billion = 40억 1,000만 달러; $874.8 million = 8억 7,480만 달러; $3.15 billion = 31억 5,000만 달러; $3.415 = 3.415달러; $3.35 = 3.35달러; $150 = 150달러.

of Directors approved an increase to the quarterly dividend level to $2.30 per share beginning with the dividend expected to be declared in May 2026 and an additional $7 billion for repurchases of our common stock. MILPITAS, Calif., April 29, 2026 - KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced financial and operating results for its third quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on March 31, 2026, and reported GAAP net income of $1.20 billion and GAAP net income per diluted share of $9.12 on revenues of $3.415 billion. “KLA delivered strong March quarter results exceeding the midpoint of our guidance ranges on both revenue and earnings per share. Our business momentum remains robust, and we are highly confident in our outlook for calendar year 2026,” said Rick Wallace, president and CEO of KLA Corporation  Normalized numeric aliases: $7 billion = 70억 달러; $1.20 billion = 12억 달러; $3.415 billion = 34억 1,500만 달러; $2.30 = 2.30달러; $7 = 7달러; $1.20 = 1.20달러; $9.12 = 9.12달러; $3.415 = 3.415달러.

r of the AI ecosystem and our continued benefits from the global AI infrastructure buildout across all major growth vectors, including foundry/logic, memory, advanced packaging, and services. KLA’s market leadership was further reinforced by recently published third-party industry reports showing continued market share momentum in process control. Our recent capital return actions, including the 17th consecutive annual dividend increase and an additional $7 billion stock repurchase authorization, underscore our confidence in KLA’s durable value creation and the 2030 target model we have outlined.” GAAP Results Q3 FY 2026 Q2 FY 2026 Q3 FY 2025 Total Revenue  Normalized numeric aliases: $7 billion = 70억 달러; $3,415 million = 34억 1,500만 달러; $3,297 million = 32억 9,700만 달러; $3,063 million = 30억 6,300만 달러; $1,201 million = 12억 100만 달러; $1,146 million = 11억 4,600만 달러; $1,088 million = 10억 8,800만 달러; $1,239 million = 12억 3,900만 달러; $7 = 7달러; $3,415 = 3,415달러; $3,297 = 3,297달러; $3,063 = 3,063달러.

lion $1,121 million Net Income per Diluted Share $9.40 $8.85 $8.41 A reconciliation between GAAP operating results and non-GAAP operating results is provided following the financial statements included in this release. KLA will discuss the results for its fiscal year 2026 third quarter, along with its outlook, on a conference call today beginning at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time. A webcast of the call will be available at: ir.kla.com . Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Guidance The following details our guidance for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026 ending in June: • Total revenues are expected to be in a range of $3.575 billion +/- $200 million • GAAP gross margin is expected to be in a range of 60.72% +/- 1.00% • Non-GAAP gros  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,121 million = 11억 2,100만 달러; $3.575 billion = 35억 7,500만 달러; $200 million = 2억 달러; $1,121 = 1,121달러; $9.40 = 9.40달러; $8.85 = 8.85달러; $8.41 = 8.41달러; $3.575 = 3.575달러; $200 = 200달러; $9.66 = 9.66달러; $1.00 = 1.00달러; 1,121 million = 11억 2,100만 달러.
